name: CA-Tier-Baseline
description: Dynamic baseline population: all member users.

name: CA-Tier-P1-Managed
description: Users with O365_w/o_Teams_Bundle_M5 license in this tenant.

name: CA-Tier-Frontline
description: Users with Microsoft_Teams_EEA_New license in this tenant.

name: CA-Tier-E5
description: Users with O365_w/o_Teams_Bundle_M5 license (E5-equivalent in this tenant).

name: CA-Pilot
description: Dynamic pilot tier. Set a tenant-specific rule before enabling enforcement.
